{{Infobox group
| name = Jai clan
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Jai clan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Jai]] clan, also known as the [[Jai]] family, is a powerful and proud faction within the [[Blackflame Empire]]. Historically originating as one of many barbaric groups in the [[Desolate Wilds]], they rose to prominence through their mastery of light-aspected combat techniques on the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]]. While they have a history of briefly unifying the region through violent rule, they eventually established themselves as a major imperial power. The clan's main branch is located in the [[Blackflame Empire]], though they maintain influential branches elsewhere, such as one comparable to the [[Purelake Temple]]. The clan is led by a Patriarch, an [[Underlord]] whose leadership is central to the family's stability. The current Patriarch, [[Jai Daishou]], is a legendary figure who transformed the clan from a remote wilderness group into an imperial power. The family's strength is characterized by regimented ranks of [[sacred artists]] who utilize white light and spears. Despite their status, the clan has faced significant internal and external turmoil. A disenfranchised branch family once staged an uprising against the main branch, leading to the exile of talented members like [[Jai Long]] to the [[Desolate Wilds]]. More recently, the clan has been embroiled in conflict with the [[Arelius family]], an event that damaged their reputation and led to them being pushed out of the [[Empire]]'s core. This instability has left the clan fractured, with some members seeking new beginnings in places like the [[Twin Star sect]] or the [[Desolate Wilds]].}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Originating in the [[Desolate Wilds]], the legendary [[Jai]] clan moved its main branch to the [[Blackflame Empire]] after producing an [[Underlord]]. As a first-class clan within the empire, they are allied with the [[Sandviper sect]] and serve as a faction in the [[Alliance camp]]. The group follows the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]], utilizing light-aspected combat techniques and specific spear maneuvers represented by a twisting line of starlight. While [[Jai Long]] once held status within the clan, he is now formerly of the group. During their interactions with [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]], [[Jai Sen]] attempted to recruit the pair to work for the clan, though they ultimately avoided staying with them. Additionally, the clan possesses a spear with specific bindings that [[Eithan]] deems suitable for a particular use.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] is part of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] is a faction in the [[Alliance camp]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] wants [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] to work for the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] is a first-class clan in the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] originated in the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] uses light-aspected combat techniques on their [[Path of the Stellar Spear]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] moved their main branch to the [[Blackflame Empire]] after producing an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] is a group that [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] avoided staying with.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] is allied with the [[Sandviper sect]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] has specific spear techniques represented by a twisting line of starlight.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] is a group that [[Eithan]] considers suitable for a specific spear.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] has status within the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] possesses a spear with specific bindings.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] is a group of people.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is formerly of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] has a head branch.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai clan]] is described as legendary.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The ancient [[Jai]] clan, led by Patriarch [[Jai Daishou]], maintains a presence at the border and possesses palaces on the mountain peak in [[Serpent's Grave]]. Members of this clan, who feature black hair and wear sky blue robes marked with a star-and-spear emblem, utilize generational spear arts and the [[Star Lance]] technique. While they employ refiners, [[Soulsmiths]], and various gold-ranked members, the clan has faced internal strife as [[Jai Long]] kills clansmen in their homes and wages a guerrilla war against them. Despite seizing assets from [[Eithan]]'s family and the last refinery in Serpent’s Grave, the clan has recently slowed its aggression. Currently, they are ruthlessly reclaiming territory and hunting anyone wearing a black crescent.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">29</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has refiners and [[Soulsmiths]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has a presence at the border.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has seized assets from [[Eithan]]'s family.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] wears sky blue robes.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has black hair.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]]'s emblem is a star-and-spear.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] warriors use tall spears.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] is equipped for battle.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] uses the [[Star Lance]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Gokren]] pulled arms on the [[Jai clan]] for [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has nearly declared war on [[Eithan]]'s family.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] has been killing [[Jai]] clansmen in their homes.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has an exile.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has palaces on the mountain peak in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has a second-ranked auction house.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has publicly proposed that the [[Redflower family]] supervise sanitation.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] contains Highgolds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the Broken Star]] is trained in a secret city lost to the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has members who are Lowgolds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] seized the last refinery in Serpent’s Grave.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] main complex occupies the highest peak of [[Shiryu Mountain]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has slowed its aggression.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] is being waged a guerilla war against by [[Jai Long]] and the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] is hunting anyone wearing a black crescent.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] was reclaiming their territory with ruthless efficiency.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] is led by Patriarch [[Jai Daishou]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has spear arts passed down for generations.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] is an ancient clan.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Jai clan]] warrior in blue held a spear at [[Lindon]]'s chest.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai]] clan is a great family whose territory encompasses a lake and miles of underground tunnels. Although [[Jai Daishou]] desires for his clan to outlive him, the group is currently considered the lowest-ranked of the great clans and is crumbling in the west. Their history includes the exile of [[Jai Long]] to the [[Desolate Wilds]], and they are a group to whom [[Lindon]] mentions sending ashes. Additionally, the clan's net is something that characters intend to escape.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] wants his clan to outlive him.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] belongs to the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai clan]] territory includes a lake and miles of underground tunnel.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai clan]] is a group that [[Lindon]] mentions sending ashes to.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai clan]] is a great family.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai clan]] exiled [[Jai Long]] to the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai clan]] is the lowest-ranked of the great clans.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai clan]]'s net is something the characters intend to escape.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai clan]] is crumbling in the west.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Jai clan]] has fallen.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura]] family aims to replace the [[Jai clan]] in the [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Jai clan]] has an invader in the Valley.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Jai clan]] wore blue and carried spears.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Jai clan]] has members with spiritual senses.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Jai clan]] once owned the [[aura]] chamber used by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Jai clan]] once attacked the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“I am Jai Sen, of the Jai clan whose honor echoes in every corner of the Blackflame Empire.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“The Jai clan has refiners and Soulsmiths.”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“The paint was beginning to chip outside the Jai clan’s second-ranked auction house,”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Jai Daishou, Underlord of the Jai clan, brings you freedom!”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
